steps.name: Given  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
Then  Account 'LYRASIS Reads' is present on Accounts screen
When  I enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
Then  Login is performed successfully
When  I open Catalog
When  I switch to 'Audiobooks' catalog tab
And  I open 'New BiblioBoard Test' category
And  Change books visibility to show AVAILABLE_NOW
And  Click GET action button on random book from the catalog book screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Save book name of the book 'bookInfo' as 'bookNameInfo' on catalog book screen
Then  I check that book 'bookNameInfo' contains LISTEN action button on catalog book screen
When  Open book with LISTEN action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen
And  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
steps.statusMessage: Player of book What's in the Woods?. Audiobook. is not opened
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Player of book What's in the Woods?. Audiobook. is not opened
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.audiobookSteps.AudioPlayerSteps.isPlayerOpened(AudioPlayerSteps.java:39)
	at ✽.Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/AudiobookLyrasis.feature:279)

steps.name: And  The speed by default is 1.0
When  Open playback speed on audio player screen
And  Close playback speed screen
Then  Play button is present on audio player screen
When  Set END_OF_CHAPTER sleep timer on sleep timer audiobook screen
Then  Sleep timer is set to endOfChapter on audio player screen
When  Open sleep timer on audio player screen
And  Close sleep timer screen
Then  Play button is present on audio player screen
